category_sources: Maven artifact metadata describes Savana as augmenting Subversion with transactional workspaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the codehaus/savana official repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project repository and best available official documentation surface; no dedicated docs page or README was found in the official repository.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository codehaus/savana exists and contains project source files.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies transactional workspaces for SVN.
source_facts.source-archive is a Maven artifact, indicating Java packaging.
